title: 16 Pieces Artificial Red Berry Stems 7.8 Inch Snowy Berries Picks Christmas Tree Sprays for Xmas Decorations DIY Crafts Wreath Making Supplies Winter Season Home Party Décor (Frosted White)
features: WHAT YOU GET - 16 Pieces 7.8 Inch Artificial Holly Berries Stem Snow Frosted Berry Picks for wreath making supplies

PREMIUM MATERIAL- These holly berry branches are made of high quality foam and inside the stem is iron wire wrapped with plastic. The foam berries are covered with artificial snowy coating. They can be slightly bent and shape according to your needs.

LIFELIKE APPEARANCE - The berries are vivid and realistic, just like the real one, ables to use several festival seasons. Great choice for winter decoration on Christmas, winter, Thanksgiving, Autumn ,holiday, festival seasons. Bringing your house a feeling of warm and elegant.
EASY TO DECORATE - These Christmas berry stems can be DIY according to your own ideas, decorate into Christmas garlands, bouquets, flower balls, table centerpieces, etc.

WIDELY APPLICATION- The Christmas tree berries picks are suitable for decorating different occasions, such as Christmas trees, Xmas wreaths, ball-flower making, lanterns, windows, and more, can be applied to Christmas, New Year, birthday, wedding, party, and so on, adding a pop of color for your Christmas party.
